description: Gate should hold when deeper descent buys wording only and upward compression would erase a live distinction.
candidate_summary: The subject still distinguishes stream residue from segment residue with repo-backed control. Descending would sharpen wording only. Compressing upward would erase the still-live distinction.

expected_incorrect_decisions.why_wrong: Release would imply sufficient closure despite a still-live distinction.
Compression would erase a distinction the current layer still needs to preserve.
